rationale: The ensures is `LHS ==> det_<f>_equal(r1, r2)` and `r1`/`r2` are arbitrary parameters, so the LHS conjuncts must be introduced as hypotheses via an `if (LHS) { ... }` guard (the prior attempt asserted them directly and failed). Inside the guard, `r1.0 == r2.0` follows by transitivity through `endpoint_ptr`, the `PointsTo` views agree on `addr()` and `is_init()`, and `=~=` lifts the per-projection equalities to extensional equality on `r1.1@ == r2.1@`.
